findings.summary: No datasheets directory found and no BOM parts have MPNs. Review is a consistency check only — manufacturer specs cannot be verified.
findings.recommendation: Before reporting 'verified' findings, (1) populate the MPN field on BOM parts, (2) run the datasheet sync skill (digikey, mouser, lcsc, or element14) to download PDFs into ./datasheets/, then re-run analysis. If datasheets are unreachable, state every pin-level and electrical claim as 'per symbol/library' (consistency), not 'verified against datasheet' (correctness).

report_context.impact: Report wording must avoid 'verified' / 'datasheet-confirmed' language for every BOM part — none have manufacturer evidence attached.

findings.description: ESD protection audit for usb connector USB1: none coverage.
LED audit: LED1 using ic_direct drive method.
LC filter or resonant network detected
Fuse/polyfuse protection on __unnamed_26
Power regulator (switching) detected
Power regulator (switching) detected
Power regulator (LDO) detected

findings.summary: Regulator U2: PG status unknown for TLV62568DBVR (no datasheet extraction)
findings.description: Regulator U2 (TLV62568DBVR) supplies 3V3M to U4 but PG status is unknown. Run sync_datasheets to verify.
findings.recommendation: Run sync_datasheets to verify whether TLV62568DBVR has a PG pin.

report_context.impact: Downstream devices may latch up or boot incorrectly

findings.description: low-pass RC filter
low-pass RC filter
low-pass RC filter
Net +5V carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.description: Net VBUS carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (0/36 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 0 of 36 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (0.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

findings.description: BJT transistor circuit detected
BJT transistor circuit detected

findings.summary: No ESD/TVS protection on VBUS at USB1
findings.description: USB connector USB1: no TVS diode or ESD array found on the VBUS net. VBUS is exposed to external ESD/surge events.
findings.recommendation: Add a TVS diode or ESD array on VBUS at USB1.

findings.description: Resistive voltage divider detected
Resistive voltage divider detected
Resistive voltage divider detected

findings.summary: Net GPIO40: 5.0V / 3.3V domain crossing without level shifter
findings.description: Net GPIO40 connects ICs in 5.0V and 3.3V domains. The 5.0V output may exceed the 3.3V input absolute maximum rating of 3.6V, risking damage.
findings.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 5.0V and 3.3V domains on net GPIO40, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

findings.summary: Net GPIO41: 5.0V / 3.3V domain crossing without level shifter
findings.description: Net GPIO41 connects ICs in 5.0V and 3.3V domains. The 5.0V output may exceed the 3.3V input absolute maximum rating of 3.6V, risking damage.
findings.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 5.0V and 3.3V domains on net GPIO41, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

findings.description: Net GPIO42 connects ICs in 5.0V and 3.3V domains. The 5.0V output may exceed the 3.3V input absolute maximum rating of 3.6V, risking damage.
findings.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 5.0V and 3.3V domains on net GPIO42, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

findings.description: Detected wifi_ble wireless module U4 (ESP32-S3-WROOM-1-N16R8).

findings.summary: Lifecycle audit not run — --lifecycle flag not passed
findings.description: Component lifecycle / obsolescence audit was not run this session. Reason: --lifecycle flag not passed (run with --lifecycle to query DigiKey / Mouser / LCSC / element14 for obsolescence + operating-temp coverage; requires network + API keys). The review cannot report active / NRND / EOL / obsolete status, last-time-buy windows, or operating-temperature coverage for any BOM part. Treat the lifecycle section of the report as 'not performed'.
findings.recommendation: Run with --lifecycle (requires DIGIKEY_CLIENT_ID / MOUSER_SEARCH_API_KEY / ELEMENT14_API_KEY env vars; LCSC needs no auth) to populate this section. If intentionally skipped, note it explicitly in the report's 'Not Performed' section.

top_issues.summary: No datasheets directory found and no BOM parts have MPNs. Review is a consistency check only — manufacturer specs cannot be verified.
top_issues.recommendation: Before reporting 'verified' findings, (1) populate the MPN field on BOM parts, (2) run the datasheet sync skill (digikey, mouser, lcsc, or element14) to download PDFs into ./datasheets/, then re-run analysis. If datasheets are unreachable, state every pin-level and electrical claim as 'per symbol/library' (consistency), not 'verified against datasheet' (correctness).

report_context.impact: Report wording must avoid 'verified' / 'datasheet-confirmed' language for every BOM part — none have manufacturer evidence attached.

top_issues.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (0/36 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
top_issues.description: Sourcing audit: 0 of 36 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (0.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
top_issues.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

top_issues.summary: Net GPIO40: 5.0V / 3.3V domain crossing without level shifter
top_issues.description: Net GPIO40 connects ICs in 5.0V and 3.3V domains. The 5.0V output may exceed the 3.3V input absolute maximum rating of 3.6V, risking damage.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 5.0V and 3.3V domains on net GPIO40, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

top_issues.description: Net +5V carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

top_issues.summary: No ESD/TVS protection on VBUS at USB1
top_issues.description: USB connector USB1: no TVS diode or ESD array found on the VBUS net. VBUS is exposed to external ESD/surge events.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a TVS diode or ESD array on VBUS at USB1.
